intro: Curated, publicly available datasets across major neuro modalities. Always verify each dataset license and usage policy before publication or redistribution.

modalities.label: EEG
modalities.description: Scalp electrophysiology datasets for BCI, cognition, sleep, and clinical use-cases.

datasets.name: Temple University Hospital EEG Corpus (TUH EEG)
datasets.summary: Large clinical EEG archive widely used for seizure detection and clinical AI benchmarks.

datasets.name: CHB-MIT Scalp EEG Database
datasets.summary: Pediatric scalp EEG recordings with seizure events; classic epilepsy benchmark dataset.

datasets.name: BCI Competition IV Dataset 2a
datasets.summary: Motor imagery EEG benchmark with standardized train/test splits for BCI evaluation.

modalities.label: fNIRS
modalities.description: Functional near-infrared spectroscopy datasets for hemodynamic brain response analysis.

datasets.name: OpenfNIRS
datasets.summary: Open repository of fNIRS datasets and tooling links for reproducible analysis workflows.

datasets.name: fNIRS Motor Task Dataset (OpenNeuro collection)
datasets.summary: Task-based fNIRS recordings in BIDS-style formats for motor and cognitive experiments.

modalities.label: fMRI
modalities.description: Large-scale functional MRI datasets for connectomics, cognition, and disease modeling.

datasets.name: Human Connectome Project (HCP)
datasets.summary: High-quality multimodal MRI cohort with extensive behavioral and demographic metadata.

datasets.name: ABIDE (Autism Brain Imaging Data Exchange)
datasets.summary: Multi-site resting-state fMRI dataset focused on autism spectrum disorder research.

datasets.name: OpenNeuro fMRI Collections
datasets.summary: Open BIDS-first repository with many task/rest fMRI datasets and derivatives.

modalities.label: MEG
modalities.description: Magnetoencephalography datasets for high temporal resolution brain dynamics.

datasets.name: OMEGA (Open MEG Archive)
datasets.summary: Large open resting-state MEG archive with structural MRI and metadata.

datasets.name: Cam-CAN MEG
datasets.summary: Lifespan MEG recordings from healthy participants, useful for aging analyses.

modalities.label: EMG
modalities.description: Electromyography datasets for prosthetics, movement decoding, and motor control.

datasets.name: Ninapro DB1-DB10
datasets.summary: Widely used hand movement and prosthetic-control EMG benchmark datasets.

datasets.name: EMG-EPN612
datasets.summary: Surface EMG dataset for gesture classification and pattern recognition tasks.

modalities.label: EOG (EoG)
modalities.description: Electrooculography datasets for eye-movement, blink, and fatigue-related analyses.

datasets.name: BCI Horizon 2020 EOG Dataset
datasets.summary: Open EOG records for eye movement decoding and assistive interface studies.

datasets.name: Sleep-EDF Expanded
datasets.summary: Sleep polysomnography records containing EOG channels used in sleep staging pipelines.

modalities.label: ECoG
modalities.description: Intracranial electrocorticography datasets for high-resolution cortical recordings.

datasets.name: AJILE12
datasets.summary: Long-term naturalistic human ECoG with behavior annotations for movement neuroscience.

datasets.name: OpenNeuro iEEG / ECoG Collections
datasets.summary: Public invasive electrophysiology datasets in BIDS format across tasks and clinics.
